title: Strategy
text: With three rails, the letters follow a down-middle-up pattern. Picture the rails like steps: top → middle → bottom → middle → top → …

title: Procedure
text: Write the phrase without spaces. Starting on the top rail, place letters going down through rails 1 → 2 → 3, then back up 2 → 1, repeating this cycle. After placing all letters, read off rail 1, then 2, then 3 to get the final encoded phrase.
